heading: Delete Network Containers
body:
**Atlascli:**Atlas CLITo delete the network peering container you specify using the
Atlas CLI, run the following command:```sh

atlas networking containers delete <containerId> [options]

```To learn more about the command syntax and parameters, see the
Atlas CLI documentation for [atlas networking containers delete](atlas/cli/current/command/atlas-networking-containers-delete).**Api:**Atlas Administration APITo delete a network container, see [Remove One Network Peering Container](api/doc/atlas-admin-api-v2/operation/operation-deletegroupcontainer).
